title: Bug Hunter Developer Portfolio
seoTitle: Bug Hunter Developer Portfolio - Downloadable Premium Portfolio Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: A cinematic bug-bounty and developer portfolio with dark neon styling, animated sections, and a sharper security-focused personality.
summary: A cinematic bug-bounty and developer portfolio with dark neon styling, animated sections, and a sharper security-focused personality.
description: Built as a static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript portfolio template, Bug Hunter is ideal for security researchers, developers, and technical creators who want a darker, more tactical portfolio presence with bold personality.
style: Dark neon hacker portfolio with animated panels
audience: security researchers, bug bounty hunters, and technical freelancers
prompt: Design a premium developer portfolio for a security researcher. Use dark surfaces, tactical typography, animated sections, hacker-inspired UI details, and a high-trust personal brand.
layoutNotes: The experience feels like a hacker-inspired portfolio while still staying readable for mainstream visitors.
Sections use strong contrast and motion to make the personality memorable.
The layout is best used when the creator wants a technical, security-heavy brand.
responsiveNotes: The portfolio stacks vertically on smaller screens while keeping the hero readable.
Animations are decorative and do not block the core content on mobile.

bug_scan.sh
$ ./scan --target production
Initializing deep scan...
Scanning modules ██████████ 100%
✓ auth.service — PASSED
✓ payment.gateway — PASSED
✗ user.session — BUG DETECTED (memory leak)
✓ api.routes — PASSED
⚠ cache.handler — WARNING (race condition)
✓ db.connector — PASSED

Scan complete: 1 bug, 1 warning, 4 passed
$ _
BUG-001

About: Who is this Bug Hunter?

RESOLVED
Assignee AP Andrey Petrovic
Priority High
Status Resolved

Description

QA Engineer with 5+ years of experience breaking things professionally. I specialize in finding the bugs that nobody else can find — the ones hiding in edge cases, race conditions, and that "it works on my machine" territory.

My mission: ship software that users can trust. I've prevented thousands of bugs from reaching production across fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS platforms.

andrey_petrovic.json 
{
  "name": "Andrey Petrovic",
  "role": "Senior QA Engineer",
  "location": "Remote",
  "specialties": [
    "Test Automation",
    "Performance Testing",
    "Security Testing",
    "API Testing"
  ],
  "bugs_found": 2847,
  "coffee_consumed": "∞"
}
CHANGELOG

Experience Log

2022 — Present CURRENT

Senior QA Engineer @ TechCorp

Leading QA automation across 3 product teams. Built the entire E2E testing infrastructure from scratch. Reduced production bugs by 73%.

Cypress Playwright CI/CD Performance
🐛 1,200+ bugs caught before release
2020 — 2022 CLOSED

QA Engineer @ FinPay

Automated regression suite for payment processing. Found a critical security flaw in the token refresh flow that could have exposed 50K accounts.

Selenium API Testing Security Postman
💪 Prevented $2M+ in potential fraud losses
2018 — 2020 CLOSED

Junior QA Engineer @ ShopWave

First QA role. Built manual test plans and started automating. Tested checkout flows across 15 payment providers and 30+ locales.

Manual Testing JIRA Cross-browser
🎓 Where it all began — got hooked on breaking things
TEST COVERAGE

Skills & Tools

Test Automation

96%
Cypress Playwright Selenium WebdriverIO

API Testing

92%
Postman REST Assured GraphQL k6

CI/CD & DevOps

88%
GitHub Actions Jenkins Docker AWS

Performance

85%
JMeter Lighthouse k6 Grafana

Languages

90%
JavaScript TypeScript Python Java

Security Testing

78%
OWASP ZAP Burp Suite SQL Injection XSS
INCIDENT LOG

Notable Bug Kills

CRITICAL #BUG-4721

The Phantom Payment

Users were being double-charged on slow 3G connections due to a missing idempotency key in the payment retry logic.

Impact $180K in refunds prevented
Found via Network throttling test
🐛 SQUASHED
CRITICAL #BUG-3199

The Token Leak

Refresh tokens were being logged in plaintext to the monitoring service. Could have exposed 50K+ user sessions.

Impact 50K accounts protected
Found via Security audit
🐛 SQUASHED
HIGH #BUG-2850

The Midnight Crash

App crashed every night at exactly 00:00 UTC. A timezone conversion bug in the cron scheduler was killing the event loop.

Impact Zero downtime since fix
Found via Log pattern analysis
🐛 SQUASHED
MEDIUM #BUG-1544

The Invisible Button

Submit button disappeared on iOS Safari when keyboard was open. CSS viewport unit was calculating height wrong with the virtual keyboard.

Impact Conversion rate +22%
Found via Cross-device testing
🐛 SQUASHED
🐛

File a Bug Report

Got a project that needs testing? Let's talk.

© 2026 Andrey Petrovic — QA Engineer No bugs shipped. 🐛

files.content:
# Bug Hunter

> A QA engineer portfolio styled as a bug tracker / debugging console. Every section is a "bug report" getting resolved.

## Live Demo

[View Live Demo](https://ethhandy.github.io/portfolio-zoo/bug-hunter/)

## Features

- Status bar with live clock and "bugs squashed" counter that increments as you scroll
- Floating bug emojis drifting up through the background
- Hero with glitch text effect on hover
- Typewriter cycling through QA role titles
- Animated terminal card showing a live "bug scan" with staggered line reveals
- Counting animation for hero stats (2,847 bugs found, 99% squash rate)
- About section styled as a full bug report with metadata, assignee, priority, and JSON code block
- Experience timeline with active/closed status markers
- Skills displayed as "test coverage" percentages with animated fill bars
- "Notable Bug Kills" — trophy cards for biggest catches with severity badges and impact stats
- "SQUASHED" stamp on each bug kill card
- Contact form styled as "File a Bug Report" with priority radio selector
- Scroll reveal with staggered timing
- Fully responsive

## How to Customize

1. **Your info** — Edit name, role, stats, and experience in `index.html`
2. **Bug kills** — Replace the story cards with your own real QA war stories
3. **Skills** — Update `data-width` on `.cov-fill` elements and tool chips
4. **Colors** — All colors are in `:root` in `style.css` — uses a GitHub-dark palette by default
5. **Typewriter roles** — Edit the `roles` array in `script.js`
6. **Contact** — Wire up the form to your backend or Formspree

## Tech Stack

- HTML / CSS / JavaScript (vanilla)
- Google Fonts (JetBrains Mono, Inter)

## License

MIT
files.summary: Bug Hunter Developer Portfolio template notes and customization guide.

previewHtml:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Andrey Petrovic — QA Engineer</title>

  <meta name="description" content="Andrey Petrovic — QA Engineer. Bug tracker-themed portfolio." />
  <meta name="author" content="Andrey Petrovic" />
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#0d1117" />

  
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<style>
/* ===== RESET & BASE ===== */
*, *::before, *::after {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

:root {
  --bg: #0d1117;
  --bg-card: #161b22;
  --bg-card-hover: #1c2333;
  --bg-input: #0d1117;
  --border: #30363d;
  --border-hover: #484f58;
  --text: #e6edf3;
  --text-sec: #8b949e;
  --text-muted: #484f58;
  --green: #3fb950;
  --green-dim: #238636;
  --green-bg: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.1);
  --red: #f85149;
  --red-dim: #da3633;
  --red-bg: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.1);
  --orange: #d29922;
  --orange-bg: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.1);
  --yellow: #e3b341;
  --blue: #58a6ff;
  --blue-bg: rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.1);
  --purple: #bc8cff;
  --purple-bg: rgba(188, 140, 255, 0.1);
  --font: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  --radius: 12px;
  --radius-sm: 8px;
  --ease: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
  --max-w: 1100px;
  --px: 24px;
}

html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  font-family: var(--font);
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text);
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.container {
  max-width: var(--max-w);
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 var(--px);
}

/* ===== ANIMATED GRID BACKGROUND ===== */
.grid-bg {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(48, 54, 61, 0.3) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(48, 54, 61, 0.3) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 50px 50px;
  mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 30%, black 30%, transparent 70%);
  -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 30%, black 30%, transparent 70%);
}

/* ===== FLOATING BUGS ===== */
.floating-bugs {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.fbug {
  position: absolute;
  font-size: 16px;
  opacity: 0.06;
  animation: bugFloat linear infinite;
}

@keyframes bugFloat {
  0% {
    transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(0deg);
  }
  100% {
    transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(360deg);
  }
}

/* ===== STATUS BAR ===== */
.status-bar {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 200;
  height: 32px;
  background: #010409;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 16px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--text-sec);
}

.status-left, .status-right {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}

.status-led {
  width: 6px;
  height: 6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: ledBlink 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.status-led.green {
  background: var(--green);
  box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--green);
}

@keyframes ledBlink {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
  50% { opacity: 0.4; }
}

.status-sep {
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

.counter {
  color: var(--green);
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ===== NAVIGATION ===== */
.nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 32px;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 100;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 12px var(--px);
  background: rgba(13, 17, 23, 0.85);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.nav-logo {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.bug-icon {
  font-size: 22px;
}

.logo-name {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text);
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.logo-accent {
  color: var(--red);
}

.nav-links {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.nav-link {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--text-sec);
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
}

.nav-link:hover {
  color: var(--text);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
}

.nav-id {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  margin-right: 4px;
}

/* ===== SEVERITY BADGES ===== */
.severity {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.severity.critical {
  background: var(--red-bg);
  color: var(--red);
  border: 1px solid rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.3);
}

.severity.resolved {
  background: var(--green-bg);
  color: var(--green);
  border: 1px solid rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.3);
}

.severity.active-tag {
  background: var(--blue-bg);
  color: var(--blue);
  border: 1px solid rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.3);
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */
.hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 60px;
  padding: 120px var(--px) 80px;
  max-width: var(--max-w);
  margin: 0 auto;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

.hero-content {
  flex: 1;
}

.ticket-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.6s var(--ease) both;
}

.ticket-id {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.hero-title {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: clamp(40px, 6vw, 64px);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

/* Glitch effect */
.glitch {
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.6s var(--ease) 0.1s both;
}

.glitch:nth-child(2) {
  animation-delay: 0.2s;
}

.glitch:hover {
  animation: glitchText 0.4s ease-in-out;
}

@keyframes glitchText {
  0% { transform: translate(0); }
  20% { transform: translate(-3px, 2px); color: var(--red); }
  40% { transform: translate(3px, -2px); color: var(--blue); }
  60% { transform: translate(-2px, -1px); color: var(--green); }
  80% { transform: translate(2px, 1px); }
  100% { transform: translate(0); }
}

.hero-role {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 18px;
  color: var(--green);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.6s var(--ease) 0.3s both;
}

.role-prefix {
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

.type-cursor {
  animation: cursorBlink 0.8s step-end infinite;
  color: var(--green);
}

@keyframes cursorBlink {
  50% { opacity: 0; }
}

.hero-desc {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: var(--text-sec);
  max-width: 460px;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.6s var(--ease) 0.4s both;
}

/* Hero stats */
.hero-stats {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 36px;
  padding: 20px 24px;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.6s var(--ease) 0.5s both;
}

.hstat {
  text-align: center;
}

.hstat-val {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 32px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--green);
  display: inline;
}

.hstat-unit {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--green);
}

.hstat-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.hstat-divider {
  width: 1px;
  height: 40px;
  background: var(--border);
}

/* Hero actions */
.hero-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.6s var(--ease) 0.6s both;
}

.btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 12px 24px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  font-family: var(--font);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.3s, background 0.2s;
  border: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--green-dim);
  color: white;
}

.btn-primary:hover {
  background: var(--green);
  color: #0d1117;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.3);
}

.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.btn-outline:hover {
  border-color: var(--border-hover);
  background: var(--bg-card);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.btn-bug {
  font-size: 16px;
}

/* Terminal card */
.hero-visual {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: min(440px, 45%);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease) 0.3s both;
}

.terminal-card {
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #010409;
}

.tc-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.tc-dots {
  display: flex;
  gap: 6px;
}

.tc-dot {
  width: 10px;
  height: 10px;
  border-radius: 50%;
}

.tc-dot.red { background: var(--red); }
.tc-dot.yellow { background: var(--yellow); }
.tc-dot.green { background: var(--green); }

.tc-title {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

.tc-body {
  padding: 14px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.tc-line {
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.tc-prompt {
  color: var(--green);
  margin-right: 6px;
}

.tc-dim { color: var(--text-muted); }
.tc-success { color: var(--green); }
.tc-error { color: var(--red); }
.tc-warn { color: var(--orange); }
.tc-result { color: var(--text-sec); }

.tc-progress {
  color: var(--green);
  letter-spacing: -2px;
}

.tc-cursor {
  color: var(--green);
  animation: cursorBlink 0.8s step-end infinite;
}

/* ===== SECTION COMMON ===== */
.section {
  padding: 100px 0;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

.section-header {
  margin-bottom: 48px;
}

.section-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  color: var(--green);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  background: var(--green-bg);
  border: 1px solid rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.2);
  border-radius: 20px;
}

.section-title {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 40px);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

/* ===== BUG REPORT — ABOUT ===== */
.bug-report {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.br-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 20px 24px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 12px;
}

.br-title-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
}

.br-id {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.br-title {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.br-meta {
  display: flex;
  gap: 32px;
  padding: 16px 24px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01);
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.meta-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
}

.meta-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.meta-val {
  font-size: 14px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.avatar-sm {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-dim), var(--green));
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: white;
}

.priority-dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
}

.priority-dot.high {
  background: var(--orange);
  box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--orange);
}

.status-badge {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
}

.status-badge.resolved {
  background: var(--green-bg);
  color: var(--green);
}

.br-body {
  padding: 24px;
}

.br-description {
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}

.br-description h3 {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text-sec);
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.br-description p {
  color: var(--text-sec);
  font-size: 15px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

/* Code block */
.br-code-block {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.code-header {
  padding: 8px 14px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

.code-body {
  padding: 16px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  overflow-x: auto;
  background: #010409;
}

.code-key { color: var(--blue); }
.code-str { color: var(--green); }
.code-num { color: var(--orange); }

/* ===== TIMELINE — EXPERIENCE ===== */
.timeline {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0;
}

.tl-item {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
}

.tl-marker {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 20px;
}

.tl-dot {
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 3px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  z-index: 1;
}

.tl-dot.active {
  border-color: var(--green);
  background: var(--green);
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.4);
}

.tl-dot.closed {
  border-color: var(--text-muted);
}

.tl-line {
  width: 2px;
  flex: 1;
  background: var(--border);
}

.tl-card {
  flex: 1;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  transition: border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
}

.tl-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--border-hover);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
}

.tl-card-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.tl-date {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

.tl-card h3 {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.tl-company {
  color: var(--text-sec);
  font-weight: 500;
}

.tl-card p {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--text-sec);
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.tl-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.tag {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 11px;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  color: var(--text-sec);
}

.tl-stat {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--green);
  padding-top: 12px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.tl-stat-icon {
  font-size: 16px;
}

/* ===== COVERAGE — SKILLS ===== */
.coverage-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 16px;
}

.cov-card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 24px;
  transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s var(--ease);
}

.cov-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--border-hover);
  transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.cov-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.cov-header h3 {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.cov-pct {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--green);
}

.cov-bar {
  height: 6px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.cov-fill {
  height: 100%;
  width: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green-dim), var(--green));
  box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.3);
  transition: width 1.2s var(--ease);
}

.cov-fill.animate {
  width: var(--target-width);
}

.cov-tools {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
}

.tool-chip {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 11px;
  padding: 4px 10px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  color: var(--text-sec);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

/* ===== BUG KILLS ===== */
.kills-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 16px;
}

.kill-card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 24px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s var(--ease);
}

.kill-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--border-hover);
  transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.kill-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.kill-sev {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
}

.kill-sev.critical {
  background: var(--red-bg);
  color: var(--red);
  border: 1px solid rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.3);
}

.kill-sev.high-sev {
  background: var(--orange-bg);
  color: var(--orange);
  border: 1px solid rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.3);
}

.kill-sev.medium-sev {
  background: var(--blue-bg);
  color: var(--blue);
  border: 1px solid rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.3);
}

.kill-id {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

.kill-title {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.kill-desc {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--text-sec);
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.kill-impact {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 14px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.impact-item {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.impact-label {
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

.impact-val {
  color: var(--text-sec);
  font-weight: 500;
}

.critical-text {
  color: var(--red) !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
}

.kill-stamp {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--green);
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  opacity: 0.7;
  transform: rotate(-3deg);
}

.stamp-icon {
  font-size: 20px;
}

/* ===== CONTACT / REPORT ===== */
.report-card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 40px;
}

.report-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
  padding-bottom: 24px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.report-icon {
  font-size: 40px;
}

.report-header h2 {
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.report-sub {
  color: var(--text-sec);
  font-size: 14px;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.report-form {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20px;
}

.form-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 16px;
}

.form-group label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-sec);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.required {
  color: var(--red);
}

.form-group input,
.form-group textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  background: var(--bg-input);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: var(--font);
  font-size: 14px;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  outline: none;
}

.form-group input:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--green);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.15);
}

.form-group textarea {
  resize: vertical;
  min-height: 100px;
}

.priority-select {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.prio-option {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.prio-option input {
  display: none;
}

.prio-chip {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 6px 16px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  transition: all 0.2s;
  display: inline-block;
}

.prio-option input:checked + .low-chip {
  background: var(--blue-bg);
  color: var(--blue);
  border-color: rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.4);
}

.prio-option input:checked + .med-chip {
  background: var(--orange-bg);
  color: var(--orange);
  border-color: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.4);
}

.prio-option input:checked + .high-chip {
  background: var(--red-bg);
  color: var(--red);
  border-color: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.4);
}

.prio-option input:checked + .crit-chip {
  background: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.2);
  color: var(--red);
  border-color: var(--red);
  box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.2);
}

.btn-submit {
  align-self: flex-start;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */
.footer {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

.footer-inner {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 24px 0;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

.footer-tagline {
  color: var(--green);
}

.footer-bug {
  display: inline-block;
  animation: bugWiggle 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes bugWiggle {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0); }
  25% { transform: rotate(-10deg); }
  75% { transform: rotate(10deg); }
}

/* ===== SCROLL REVEAL ===== */
.reveal {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(30px);
  transition: opacity 0.6s var(--ease), transform 0.6s var(--ease);
}

.reveal.visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

@keyframes fadeSlideUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .hero {
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 40px;
  }

  .hero-visual {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .hero-stats {
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .coverage-grid,
  .kills-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .form-row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .br-meta {
    gap: 20px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 600px) {
  :root {
    --px: 16px;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: none;
  }

  .hero-stats {
    padding: 16px;
    gap: 16px;
  }

  .hstat-val {
    font-size: 24px;
  }

  .report-card {
    padding: 24px;
  }

  .footer-inner {
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 8px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .br-header {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .br-title-row {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 6px;
  }
}

</style></head>
<body>

  <!-- Animated grid background -->
  <div class="grid-bg"></div>

  <!-- Floating bugs -->
  <div class="floating-bugs" id="floatingBugs"></div>

  <!-- Top status bar -->
  <div class="status-bar">
    <div class="status-left">
      <span class="status-led green"></span>
      <span class="status-text">SYSTEM ONLINE</span>
      <span class="status-sep">|</span>
      <span class="status-text" id="bugCounter">BUGS SQUASHED: <span class="counter">0</span></span>
    </div>
    <div class="status-right">
      <span class="status-text" id="statusClock"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Navigation -->
  <nav class="nav">
    <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
      <span class="bug-icon">🐛</span>
      <span class="logo-name">BUG<span class="logo-accent">HUNTER</span></span>
    </a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#about" class="nav-link" data-section="about">
        <span class="nav-id">#001</span> About
      </a>
      <a href="#experience" class="nav-link" data-section="experience">
        <span class="nav-id">#002</span> Experience
      </a>
      <a href="#skills" class="nav-link" data-section="skills">
        <span class="nav-id">#003</span> Skills
      </a>
      <a href="#kills" class="nav-link" data-section="kills">
        <span class="nav-id">#004</span> Bug Kills
      </a>
      <a href="#contact" class="nav-link" data-section="contact">
        <span class="nav-id">#005</span> Report
      </a>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <!-- Hero -->
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-content">
      <div class="ticket-badge">
        <span class="ticket-id">TICKET-0001</span>
        <span class="severity critical">CRITICAL</span>
      </div>
      <h1 class="hero-title">
        <span class="glitch" data-text="Andrey">Andrey</span>
        <span class="glitch" data-text="Petrovic">Petrovic</span>
      </h1>
      <div class="hero-role">
        <span class="role-prefix">></span>
        <span class="typewriter" id="heroTyper"></span>
        <span class="type-cursor">|</span>
      </div>
      <p class="hero-desc">I find bugs before your users do. I break things on purpose so nothing breaks by accident.</p>

      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="hstat">
          <span class="hstat-val" data-target="2847">0</span>
          <span class="hstat-label">Bugs Found</span>
        </div>
        <div class="hstat-divider"></div>
        <div class="hstat">
          <span class="hstat-val" data-target="2841">0</span>
          <span class="hstat-label">Bugs Resolved</span>
        </div>
        <div class="hstat-divider"></div>
        <div class="hstat">
          <span class="hstat-val" data-target="99">0</span>
          <span class="hstat-unit">%</span>
          <span class="hstat-label">Squash Rate</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#kills" class="btn btn-primary">
          <span class="btn-bug">🐛</span>
          View Bug Kills
        </a>
        <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-outline">File a Report</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-visual">
      <div class="terminal-card">
        <div class="tc-header">
          <div class="tc-dots">
            <span class="tc-dot red"></span>
            <span class="tc-dot yellow"></span>
            <span class="tc-dot green"></span>
          </div>
          <span class="tc-title">bug_scan.sh</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tc-body" id="scanOutput">
          <div class="tc-line"><span class="tc-prompt">$</span> ./scan --target production</div>
          <div class="tc-line tc-dim">Initializing deep scan...</div>
          <div class="tc-line tc-dim">Scanning modules <span class="tc-progress" id="scanBar">██████████</span> 100%</div>
          <div class="tc-line tc-success">✓ auth.service — PASSED</div>
          <div class="tc-line tc-success">✓ payment.gateway — PASSED</div>
          <div class="tc-line tc-error">✗ user.session — BUG DETECTED (memory leak)</div>
          <div class="tc-line tc-success">✓ api.routes — PASSED</div>
          <div class="tc-line tc-warn">⚠ cache.handler — WARNING (race condition)</div>
          <div class="tc-line tc-success">✓ db.connector — PASSED</div>
          <div class="tc-line"><br/></div>
          <div class="tc-line tc-result">Scan complete: <span class="tc-error">1 bug</span>, <span class="tc-warn">1 warning</span>, <span class="tc-success">4 passed</span></div>
          <div class="tc-line"><span class="tc-prompt">$</span> <span class="tc-cursor">_</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- About — styled as a bug report -->
  <section class="section" id="about">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="bug-report">
        <div class="br-header">
          <div class="br-title-row">
            <span class="br-id">BUG-001</span>
            <h2 class="br-title">About: Who is this Bug Hunter?</h2>
          </div>
          <span class="severity resolved">RESOLVED</span>
        </div>
        <div class="br-meta">
          <div class="meta-item">
            <span class="meta-label">Assignee</span>
            <span class="meta-val">
              <span class="avatar-sm">AP</span> Andrey Petrovic
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="meta-item">
            <span class="meta-label">Priority</span>
            <span class="meta-val"><span class="priority-dot high"></span> High</span>
          </div>
          <div class="meta-item">
            <span class="meta-label">Status</span>
            <span class="meta-val status-badge resolved">Resolved</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="br-body">
          <div class="br-description">
            <h3>Description</h3>
            <p>QA Engineer with 5+ years of experience breaking things professionally. I specialize in finding the bugs that nobody else can find — the ones hiding in edge cases, race conditions, and that "it works on my machine" territory.</p>
            <p>My mission: ship software that users can trust. I've prevented thousands of bugs from reaching production across fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS platforms.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="br-code-block">
            <div class="code-header">
              <span>andrey_petrovic.json</span>
            </div>
            <pre class="code-body"><code>{
  "<span class="code-key">name</span>": "<span class="code-str">Andrey Petrovic</span>",
  "<span class="code-key">role</span>": "<span class="code-str">Senior QA Engineer</span>",
  "<span class="code-key">location</span>": "<span class="code-str">Remote</span>",
  "<span class="code-key">specialties</span>": [
    "<span class="code-str">Test Automation</span>",
    "<span class="code-str">Performance Testing</span>",
    "<span class="code-str">Security Testing</span>",
    "<span class="code-str">API Testing</span>"
  ],
  "<span class="code-key">bugs_found</span>": <span class="code-num">2847</span>,
  "<span class="code-key">coffee_consumed</span>": "<span class="code-str">∞</span>"
}</code></pre>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Experience — timeline of bug reports -->
  <section class="section" id="experience">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-header">
        <span class="section-tag">CHANGELOG</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">Experience Log</h2>
      </div>

      <div class="timeline">
        <div class="tl-item reveal" data-status="active">
          <div class="tl-marker">
            <span class="tl-dot active"></span>
            <span class="tl-line"></span>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-card">
            <div class="tl-card-header">
              <span class="tl-date">2022 — Present</span>
              <span class="severity active-tag">CURRENT</span>
            </div>
            <h3>Senior QA Engineer <span class="tl-company">@ TechCorp</span></h3>
            <p>Leading QA automation across 3 product teams. Built the entire E2E testing infrastructure from scratch. Reduced production bugs by 73%.</p>
            <div class="tl-tags">
              <span class="tag">Cypress</span>
              <span class="tag">Playwright</span>
              <span class="tag">CI/CD</span>
              <span class="tag">Performance</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tl-stat">
              <span class="tl-stat-icon">🐛</span>
              <span>1,200+ bugs caught before release</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="tl-item reveal" data-status="closed">
          <div class="tl-marker">
            <span class="tl-dot closed"></span>
            <span class="tl-line"></span>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-card">
            <div class="tl-card-header">
              <span class="tl-date">2020 — 2022</span>
              <span class="severity resolved">CLOSED</span>
            </div>
            <h3>QA Engineer <span class="tl-company">@ FinPay</span></h3>
            <p>Automated regression suite for payment processing. Found a critical security flaw in the token refresh flow that could have exposed 50K accounts.</p>
            <div class="tl-tags">
              <span class="tag">Selenium</span>
              <span class="tag">API Testing</span>
              <span class="tag">Security</span>
              <span class="tag">Postman</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tl-stat">
              <span class="tl-stat-icon">💪</span>
              <span>Prevented $2M+ in potential fraud losses</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="tl-item reveal" data-status="closed">
          <div class="tl-marker">
            <span class="tl-dot closed"></span>
            <span class="tl-line"></span>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-card">
            <div class="tl-card-header">
              <span class="tl-date">2018 — 2020</span>
              <span class="severity resolved">CLOSED</span>
            </div>
            <h3>Junior QA Engineer <span class="tl-company">@ ShopWave</span></h3>
            <p>First QA role. Built manual test plans and started automating. Tested checkout flows across 15 payment providers and 30+ locales.</p>
            <div class="tl-tags">
              <span class="tag">Manual Testing</span>
              <span class="tag">JIRA</span>
              <span class="tag">Cross-browser</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tl-stat">
              <span class="tl-stat-icon">🎓</span>
              <span>Where it all began — got hooked on breaking things</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Skills — styled as test coverage report -->
  <section class="section" id="skills">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-header">
        <span class="section-tag">TEST COVERAGE</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">Skills & Tools</h2>
      </div>

      <div class="coverage-grid">
        <div class="cov-card reveal">
          <div class="cov-header">
            <h3>Test Automation</h3>
            <span class="cov-pct">96%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cov-bar"><div class="cov-fill" data-width="96"></div></div>
          <div class="cov-tools">
            <span class="tool-chip">Cypress</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">Playwright</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">Selenium</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">WebdriverIO</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="cov-card reveal">
          <div class="cov-header">
            <h3>API Testing</h3>
            <span class="cov-pct">92%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cov-bar"><div class="cov-fill" data-width="92"></div></div>
          <div class="cov-tools">
            <span class="tool-chip">Postman</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">REST Assured</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">GraphQL</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">k6</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="cov-card reveal">
          <div class="cov-header">
            <h3>CI/CD & DevOps</h3>
            <span class="cov-pct">88%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cov-bar"><div class="cov-fill" data-width="88"></div></div>
          <div class="cov-tools">
            <span class="tool-chip">GitHub Actions</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">Jenkins</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">Docker</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">AWS</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="cov-card reveal">
          <div class="cov-header">
            <h3>Performance</h3>
            <span class="cov-pct">85%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cov-bar"><div class="cov-fill" data-width="85"></div></div>
          <div class="cov-tools">
            <span class="tool-chip">JMeter</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">Lighthouse</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">k6</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">Grafana</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="cov-card reveal">
          <div class="cov-header">
            <h3>Languages</h3>
            <span class="cov-pct">90%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cov-bar"><div class="cov-fill" data-width="90"></div></div>
          <div class="cov-tools">
            <span class="tool-chip">JavaScript</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">TypeScript</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">Python</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">Java</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="cov-card reveal">
          <div class="cov-header">
            <h3>Security Testing</h3>
            <span class="cov-pct">78%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cov-bar"><div class="cov-fill" data-width="78"></div></div>
          <div class="cov-tools">
            <span class="tool-chip">OWASP ZAP</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">Burp Suite</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">SQL Injection</span>
            <span class="tool-chip">XSS</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Bug Kills — trophy showcase -->
  <section class="section" id="kills">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-header">
        <span class="section-tag">INCIDENT LOG</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">Notable Bug Kills</h2>
      </div>

      <div class="kills-grid">
        <div class="kill-card reveal">
          <div class="kill-header">
            <span class="kill-sev critical">CRITICAL</span>
            <span class="kill-id">#BUG-4721</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="kill-title">The Phantom Payment</h3>
          <p class="kill-desc">Users were being double-charged on slow 3G connections due to a missing idempotency key in the payment retry logic.</p>
          <div class="kill-impact">
            <div class="impact-item">
              <span class="impact-label">Impact</span>
              <span class="impact-val critical-text">$180K in refunds prevented</span>
            </div>
            <div class="impact-item">
              <span class="impact-label">Found via</span>
              <span class="impact-val">Network throttling test</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="kill-stamp">
            <span class="stamp-icon">🐛</span>
            <span class="stamp-text">SQUASHED</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="kill-card reveal">
          <div class="kill-header">
            <span class="kill-sev critical">CRITICAL</span>
            <span class="kill-id">#BUG-3199</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="kill-title">The Token Leak</h3>
          <p class="kill-desc">Refresh tokens were being logged in plaintext to the monitoring service. Could have exposed 50K+ user sessions.</p>
          <div class="kill-impact">
            <div class="impact-item">
              <span class="impact-label">Impact</span>
              <span class="impact-val critical-text">50K accounts protected</span>
            </div>
            <div class="impact-item">
              <span class="impact-label">Found via</span>
              <span class="impact-val">Security audit</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="kill-stamp">
            <span class="stamp-icon">🐛</span>
            <span class="stamp-text">SQUASHED</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="kill-card reveal">
          <div class="kill-header">
            <span class="kill-sev high-sev">HIGH</span>
            <span class="kill-id">#BUG-2850</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="kill-title">The Midnight Crash</h3>
          <p class="kill-desc">App crashed every night at exactly 00:00 UTC. A timezone conversion bug in the cron scheduler was killing the event loop.</p>
          <div class="kill-impact">
            <div class="impact-item">
              <span class="impact-label">Impact</span>
              <span class="impact-val">Zero downtime since fix</span>
            </div>
            <div class="impact-item">
              <span class="impact-label">Found via</span>
              <span class="impact-val">Log pattern analysis</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="kill-stamp">
            <span class="stamp-icon">🐛</span>
            <span class="stamp-text">SQUASHED</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="kill-card reveal">
          <div class="kill-header">
            <span class="kill-sev medium-sev">MEDIUM</span>
            <span class="kill-id">#BUG-1544</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="kill-title">The Invisible Button</h3>
          <p class="kill-desc">Submit button disappeared on iOS Safari when keyboard was open. CSS viewport unit was calculating height wrong with the virtual keyboard.</p>
          <div class="kill-impact">
            <div class="impact-item">
              <span class="impact-label">Impact</span>
              <span class="impact-val">Conversion rate +22%</span>
            </div>
            <div class="impact-item">
              <span class="impact-label">Found via</span>
              <span class="impact-val">Cross-device testing</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="kill-stamp">
            <span class="stamp-icon">🐛</span>
            <span class="stamp-text">SQUASHED</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Contact — styled as "File a Bug Report" -->
  <section class="section" id="contact">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="report-card">
        <div class="report-header">
          <span class="report-icon">🐛</span>
          <div>
            <h2>File a Bug Report</h2>
            <p class="report-sub">Got a project that needs testing? Let's talk.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <form class="report-form" id="contactForm">
          <div class="form-row">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Reporter Name <span class="required">*</span></label>
              <input type="text" placeholder="Your name" required />
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Email <span class="required">*</span></label>
              <input type="email" placeholder="your@email.com" required />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Priority</label>
            <div class="priority-select">
              <label class="prio-option">
                <input type="radio" name="priority" value="low" />
                <span class="prio-chip low-chip">Low</span>
              </label>
              <label class="prio-option">
                <input type="radio" name="priority" value="medium" checked />
                <span class="prio-chip med-chip">Medium</span>
              </label>
              <label class="prio-option">
                <input type="radio" name="priority" value="high" />
                <span class="prio-chip high-chip">High</span>
              </label>
              <label class="prio-option">
                <input type="radio" name="priority" value="critical" />
                <span class="prio-chip crit-chip">Critical</span>
              </label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Description <span class="required">*</span></label>
            <textarea rows="5" placeholder="Steps to reproduce the issue..." required></textarea>
          </div>
          <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-submit">
            <span>Submit Report</span>
            <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
          </button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <footer class="footer">
    <div class="container footer-inner">
      <span>© 2026 Andrey Petrovic — QA Engineer</span>
      <span class="footer-tagline">No bugs shipped. <span class="footer-bug">🐛</span></span>
    </div>
  </footer>

  
<script>
// ===== Clock in status bar =====
function updateClock() {
  const now = new Date();
  const h = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const m = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const s = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  document.getElementById('statusClock').textContent = `${h}:${m}:${s}`;
}
updateClock();
setInterval(updateClock, 1000);

// ===== Floating bugs =====
const bugsContainer = document.getElementById('floatingBugs');
const bugEmojis = ['🐛', '🪲', '🐞', '🦗'];

for (let i = 0; i < 15; i++) {
  const bug = document.createElement('div');
  bug.className = 'fbug';
  bug.textContent = bugEmojis[Math.floor(Math.random() * bugEmojis.length)];
  bug.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
  bug.style.fontSize = (12 + Math.random() * 16) + 'px';
  bug.style.animationDuration = (15 + Math.random() * 25) + 's';
  bug.style.animationDelay = -(Math.random() * 30) + 's';
  bugsContainer.appendChild(bug);
}

// ===== Typewriter for hero role =====
const roles = [
  'QA Engineer',
  'Bug Hunter',
  'Test Automation Architect',
  'Quality Guardian',
  'Chaos Engineer'
];

const typer = document.getElementById('heroTyper');
let roleIdx = 0;
let charIdx = 0;
let deleting = false;
let pauseTimer = 0;

function typeRole() {
  const current = roles[roleIdx];

  if (!deleting) {
    typer.textContent = current.slice(0, charIdx + 1);
    charIdx++;

    if (charIdx >= current.length) {
      pauseTimer = 40;
      deleting = true;
    }
  } else {
    if (pauseTimer > 0) {
      pauseTimer--;
    } else {
      charIdx--;
      typer.textContent = current.slice(0, charIdx);

      if (charIdx <= 0) {
        deleting = false;
        roleIdx = (roleIdx + 1) % roles.length;
      }
    }
  }

  const speed = deleting && pauseTimer <= 0 ? 40 : 80;
  setTimeout(typeRole, speed);
}

typeRole();

// ===== Counter animation =====
function animateCounters() {
  const counters = document.querySelectorAll('.hstat-val[data-target]');

  counters.forEach(el => {
    const target = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-target'));
    const duration = 2000;
    const start = performance.now();

    function update(now) {
      const elapsed = now - start;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
      el.textContent = Math.floor(target * eased).toLocaleString();

      if (progress < 1) {
        requestAnimationFrame(update);
      }
    }

    requestAnimationFrame(update);
  });
}

// ===== Bug squash counter =====
let squashCount = 0;
const squashEl = document.querySelector('#bugCounter .counter');

function incrementSquash() {
  squashCount++;
  squashEl.textContent = squashCount;
}

// ===== Scroll reveal =====
const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');

const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(
  (entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        const siblings = entry.target.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
        const idx = Array.from(siblings).indexOf(entry.target);
        entry.target.style.transitionDelay = `${idx * 0.1}s`;
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
        incrementSquash();
      }
    });
  },
  { threshold: 0.15 }
);

reveals.forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el));

// ===== Coverage bar animation =====
const covFills = document.querySelectorAll('.cov-fill');

const covObserver = new IntersectionObserver(
  (entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        const fill = entry.target;
        const width = fill.getAttribute('data-width');
        fill.style.setProperty('--target-width', width + '%');
        fill.classList.add('animate');
        covObserver.unobserve(fill);
      }
    });
  },
  { threshold: 0.5 }
);

covFills.forEach(el => covObserver.observe(el));

// ===== Start hero counters when visible =====
const heroStats = document.querySelector('.hero-stats');
let countersStarted = false;

const statsObserver = new IntersectionObserver(
  (entries) => {
    if (entries[0].isIntersecting && !countersStarted) {
      countersStarted = true;
      animateCounters();
    }
  },
  { threshold: 0.5 }
);

if (heroStats) {
  statsObserver.observe(heroStats);
}

// ===== Terminal scan animation =====
const scanLines = document.querySelectorAll('#scanOutput .tc-line');

scanLines.forEach((line, i) => {
  line.style.opacity = '0';
  line.style.transform = 'translateX(-10px)';
  line.style.transition = 'opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s';

  setTimeout(() => {
    line.style.opacity = '1';
    line.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
  }, 300 + i * 200);
});

// ===== Contact form =====
const form = document.getElementById('contactForm');

form.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();

  const btn = form.querySelector('.btn-submit span');
  btn.textContent = '✓ Report Filed!';

  setTimeout(() => {
    btn.textContent = 'Submit Report';
    form.reset();
  }, 3000);
});

// ===== Nav active state =====
const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section[id]');
const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');

window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  let current = '';
  sections.forEach(section => {
    if (window.scrollY >= section.offsetTop - 200) {
      current = section.getAttribute('id');
    }
  });

  navLinks.forEach(link => {
    link.style.color = '';
    link.style.background = '';
    if (link.getAttribute('data-section') === current) {
      link.style.color = 'var(--text)';
      link.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)';
    }
  });
});

</script></body>
</html>
